invariants_checked: MEM-0074 parallel autonomy deferred until leases/worktrees/merge/batch QA
MEM-0077 Codexter invocation remains normal Codex plus installed skills

summary: The new ticket set preserves the post-Symphony roadmap as planning-review work rather than accidental ready queue work. The split is coherent: source registry, board/compute respec, Symphony shim, BoardAdapter, compute selector, parallel Ralph design, and Symphony-style spec template each have separate proof surfaces and dependencies.

rubric_sections.name: spec-contract
findings: Each ticket maps to one future capability or design boundary from the Symphony discussion.
Dependencies keep implementation tickets behind the board/compute spec and avoid making parallel Ralph ready before leases and compute selection exist.
rubric_sections.next_action: Keep these tickets in review until the operator chooses which roadmap branch to approve.

rubric_sections.name: implementation-plan
findings: The tickets include file maps, typed sketches, flow examples, acceptance criteria, verification commands, and autonomy readiness notes.
The split avoids layer tickets and instead follows durable ownership boundaries: source provenance, system spec, external shim, adapter, compute policy, parallel design, and spec discipline.
rubric_sections.next_action: Run impl-plan on the selected ticket before building.

rubric_sections.name: evidence-quality
findings: Ticket metadata validation passed across the expanded board.
A direct scan confirmed the new tickets are planning/review, ready=false, approval_required=true, and do not contain placeholder TASK-XXXX markers or completed checkboxes.
rubric_sections.next_action: Use metadata validation plus per-ticket review artifacts when any ticket moves from review to building.

verified_commands: python3 - <<'PY' ... print TASK-011* metadata summary ... PY
rg -n "TODO|TASK-XXXX|session_id|\[x\]" tickets/TASK-0110 tickets/TASK-0111 tickets/TASK-0112 tickets/TASK-0113 tickets/TASK-0114 tickets/TASK-0115 tickets/TASK-0116

git diff --check -- tickets/TASK-0110/ticket.md tickets/TASK-0111/ticket.md tickets/TASK-0112/ticket.md tickets/TASK-0113/ticket.md tickets/TASK-0114/ticket.md tickets/TASK-0115/ticket.md tickets/TASK-0116/ticket.md
next_action: Pick one roadmap branch to approve next: source registry for provenance, board/compute spec for architecture, or spec template for reusable writing discipline.
